InstructorProfile.title: InstructorProfile
InstructorProfile.description: Stores information about the driving instructor, prominently displayed to build trust.

id.description: Unique identifier for the InstructorProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the instructor.

yearsExperience.description: The number of years of field experience the instructor has in Dubai driving.

description.description: A brief biography or description of the instructor's expertise and credibility.

photoUrl.description: URL to the instructor's profile photo.

ContentSection.title: ContentSection
ContentSection.description: Represents a major section of the structured educational content, such as 'Home', 'Academic Curriculum', 'Scientific Library', or 'Rules & Signs'.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ContentSection entity.

name.description: The display name of the content section (e.g., 'Academic Curriculum', 'Scientific Library') in Arabic.

description.description: A brief description of what the content section covers.

order.description: The display order of the section, influencing its position in navigation or listings.

isPremium.description: Indicates whether access to this content section requires a premium subscription.

ContentModule.title: ContentModule
ContentModule.description: Represents a distinct educational unit, page, article, rule, or sign within a ContentSection, forming the core academic content.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ContentModule entity.

title.description: The title of the content module (e.g., 'Traffic Signs', 'Driving Maneuvers') in Arabic.

content.description: The main educational content, potentially in rich text, HTML, or Markdown format, in Arabic.

sectionId.description: Reference to the ContentSection this module belongs to. (Relationship: ContentSection 1:N ContentModule)

parentModuleId.description: Optional reference to a parent ContentModule for hierarchical organization (e.g., a specific lesson within a stage). (Relationship: ContentModule 1:N ContentModule)

order.description: The display order of the module within its section or parent module.

isPremium.description: Indicates whether access to this specific content module requires a premium subscription.

mediaUrl.description: URL to supplementary media (image, video) associated with the module, if any.

sourceReference.description: Reference to the official source of integrated regulatory content (e.g., 'RTA Driving Manual Chapter 3', 'DSSSM rules').

Quiz.title: Quiz
Quiz.description: Represents an interactive knowledge assessment quiz designed to simulate RTA tests and scenarios.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Quiz entity.

title.description: The title of the quiz (e.g., 'Traffic Signs Quiz', 'RTA Theoretical Test Simulation') in Arabic.

description.description: A brief description or introduction to the quiz, explaining its purpose.

contentModuleId.description: Optional reference to the ContentModule this quiz is associated with (e.g., a quiz for a specific curriculum stage). (Relationship: ContentModule 1:N Quiz)

durationMinutes.description: The recommended or allotted time for completing the quiz, in minutes.

passingScorePercentage.description: The minimum percentage score required to pass the quiz.

isPremium.description: Indicates whether access to this quiz requires a premium subscription.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Represents a single question within a quiz, including its text, type, and feedback explanation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Question entity.

quizId.description: Reference to the Quiz this question belongs to. (Relationship: Quiz 1:N Question)

text.description: The full text of the question, in Arabic.

imageUrl.description: URL to an image illustrating the driving scenario for the question, if applicable.

explanation.description: Detailed explanation of the correct answer and reasoning, provided as instant feedback.

order.description: The display order of the question within its quiz.

correctAnswerOptionId.description: Reference to the AnswerOption that is the correct answer for this question. (Relationship: Question 1:1 AnswerOption)

AnswerOption.title: AnswerOption
AnswerOption.description: Represents a single possible answer choice for a given question in a quiz.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AnswerOption entity.

questionId.description: Reference to the Question this answer option belongs to. (Relationship: Question 1:N AnswerOption)

text.description: The text of the answer option, in Arabic.

order.description: The display order of the answer option within its question.

UserQuizAttempt.title: UserQuizAttempt
UserQuizAttempt.description: Records a user's attempt at completing a specific quiz, tracking progress and overall score.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserQuizAttempt entity.

userId.description: Identifier for the user from an external authentication system. (Relationship: User 1:N UserQuizAttempt)

quizId.description: Reference to the Quiz that was attempted. (Relationship: Quiz 1:N UserQuizAttempt)

startTime.description: The UTC date and time when the user started the quiz attempt.

endTime.description: The UTC date and time when the user completed or submitted the quiz attempt.

score.description: The final score achieved by the user for this quiz attempt (e.g., percentage or raw score).

isCompleted.description: Indicates whether the quiz attempt was fully completed and submitted.

UserQuestionAnswer.title: UserQuestionAnswer
UserQuestionAnswer.description: Records a user's specific answer to a question within a quiz attempt, including correctness.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserQuestionAnswer entity.

userQuizAttemptId.description: Reference to the UserQuizAttempt this answer belongs to. (Relationship: UserQuizAttempt 1:N UserQuestionAnswer)

questionId.description: Reference to the Question that was answered. (Relationship: Question 1:N UserQuestionAnswer)

chosenAnswerOptionId.description: Reference to the AnswerOption chosen by the user for this question. (Relationship: AnswerOption 1:N UserQuestionAnswer)

isCorrect.description: Indicates whether the chosen answer was correct for the question.

timestamp.description: The UTC date and time when the user provided this answer.

definition.description: Stores publicly viewable information about driving instructors. All users have read access, while write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: instructorId
params.description: The unique identifier for the instructor profile.

definition.description: Represents major categories of educational content. Documents include an 'isPremium' field to control read access based on user subscription status. Write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: sectionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the content section.

definition.description: Contains individual educational units or articles nested within content sections. Each module has an 'isPremium' field for granular access control. Write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: sectionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent content section.

params.name: moduleId
params.description: The unique identifier for the content module.

definition.description: Stores interactive knowledge assessment quizzes. Each quiz includes an 'isPremium' field for access control. Write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: quizId
params.description: The unique identifier for the quiz.

definition.description: Holds individual questions belonging to a specific quiz. Includes a denormalized 'isPremium' field (copied from the parent Quiz) to ensure authorization independence. Write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: quizId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent quiz.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the question.

definition.description: Defines possible answer choices for a specific question. Includes a denormalized 'isPremium' field (copied from the grandparent Quiz) for authorization independence. Write access is restricted to administrators.

params.name: quizId
params.description: The unique identifier of the grandparent quiz.

params.name: questionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent question.

params.name: optionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the answer option.

definition.description: Records a user's attempt at completing a quiz. Access is restricted to the user identified by 'userId' in the path, ensuring path-based ownership. Administrators have full access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this quiz attempt.

params.name: attemptId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user's quiz attempt.

definition.description: Records a user's specific answer to a question within a quiz attempt. Access is restricted to the user identified by 'userId' in the parent path. Administrators have full access.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this answer, inherited from the parent path.

params.name: attemptId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent quiz attempt.

params.name: answerId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user's question answer.

definition.description: A collection used for Database-Backed Access Control (DBAC). The existence of a document at `/roles_admin/{userId}` signifies that the corresponding user is an administrator. Read access is restricted to administrators, and write access for adding/removing roles is also restricted to administrators.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user designated as an administrator.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure for 'Driving Free Academe' prioritizes security, scalability, and debuggability, adhering strictly to the core design principles and strategy mandates. 

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):**
This design achieves Authorization Independence primarily through strategic denormalization and path-based ownership. 
*   For public and premium content (`ContentSection`, `ContentModule`, `Quiz`), each document includes its own `isPremium` field. This eliminates the need for security rules to perform `get()` calls to parent documents to determine access rights. Instead, rules can directly evaluate `resource.data.isPremium` and compare it against the user's premium status (assumed to be stored in the user's profile, e.g., `/users/{uid}/isPremiumUser`).
*   Specifically, `Question` and `AnswerOption` entities, whose access depends on the `isPremium` status of their parent `Quiz`, will have the `isPremium` attribute denormalized and copied from the `Quiz` document during creation or update. This ensures that a `get()` call to the parent `Quiz` is never required for authorization of a `Question` or `AnswerOption`.
*   User-specific data (`UserQuizAttempt`, `UserQuestionAnswer`) are structured under `/users/{userId}/...`. The `userId` in the path segment directly corresponds to `request.auth.uid`, making authorization checks atomic and independent of other documents.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):**
Secure `list` operations are enabled by:
*   **Structural Segregation & Explicit Fields:** Publicly accessible content (like `InstructorProfile`) resides in top-level collections, where all documents share the same public read posture. For content with mixed access (public/premium), the `isPremium` field on each document allows rules to clearly define what can be listed by non-premium users (e.g., `where('isPremium', '==', false)`) versus premium users who can access all. This means a user's query must include the necessary filters, preventing rules from acting as filters post-query.
*   **Path-Based Ownership:** For user-owned data (e.g., `quizAttempts`, `answers`), the `/users/{userId}/` prefix ensures that `list` operations implicitly secure the data. A user can only list attempts or answers for their own `userId` as mandated by the path, aligning with QAP requirements.

**Overall Structure and Other Principles:**
*   **Structural Segregation:** Collections like `/instructorProfiles` (public), `/contentSections` (mixed public/premium), `/quizzes` (mixed public/premium), and `/users/{userId}/quizAttempts` (private) inherently group documents with homogeneous security postures.
*   **Access Modeling:** Path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}/...`) is consistently used for private, user-owned data. Global roles are managed via 'existence over content' in `/roles_admin/{userId}`.
*   **Data Clarity:** Consistent naming conventions (`{sectionId}`, `{quizId}`, `ownerId` implicit from path) and explicit `isPremium` fields contribute to predictable schema and clear intent.
